hero.subtitle: A hybrid cooperative and betrayal card game for 4 to 8 players.

universe.heading: Bloom, the garden
universe.intro: Every year, the Gardeners cooperate to make five legendary flowers bloom.
universe.quote: Cooperate, bloom, but keep your eyes open. Anything can bloom. Even doubt.
universe.body: A game of cooperation and betrayal where every match reveals a new group dynamic. Trust your teammates — but beware of the Brambles.
universe.feat_coop_desc: Play together to make the five legendary flowers bloom.
universe.feat_doubt_desc: Beware of the Brambles hiding among you.
universe.feat_poetry_desc: A poetic, mysterious universe for all ages.

rules.heading: One garden, two camps
rules.subtitle: Cooperate around the table, but stay wary: the Brambles hide among the Gardeners.
rules.gardeners_desc: Cooperate to make the flowers bloom and protect the garden from the corruption that threatens it.
rules.brambles_desc: Cooperate to plant and bloom the five legendary flowers — in appearance only.
rules.step1_desc: Each player secretly receives a card: Gardener or Bramble.
rules.step2_desc: Cooperate to plant and bloom the five legendary flowers.
rules.step3_desc: Guess, vote, unmask the Brambles before the final bloom.

leaderboard.title: Ranking of the world's best gardeners
leaderboard.description: Win games, climb the season, and let your legend bloom.
leaderboard.empty: The leaderboard will be available after the first games.

contact.description: A question about Bloom, an order, or a partnership? We'll reply quickly.
contact.error: Something went wrong, please try again.

news.title: News
news.empty: No news in this category yet.

shop.title: Shop
shop.empty: The shop opens soon. Come back shortly!

b2b.title: B2B Retailer Space
b2b.subtitle: Access your wholesale prices and place your pre-orders.
b2b.catalog_empty: The wholesale catalog will be available soon.
b2b.preorder_hint: Add your references to the cart from the catalog.

teaser.title: B2B Retailer Space
teaser.body: Access the wholesale catalog and pro prices by creating a retailer account.
teaser.not_retailer_body: To access the B2B space, create a new account with the Retailer status.

checkout.title: Payment
checkout.success_body: Thank you for your purchase. You'll receive a confirmation by email.

auth.gdpr: By creating an account, you accept our terms of use and our privacy policy.
auth.reset_need_link: A reset link is required. Open the link received by email to continue.
auth.retailer_note: ℹ️ Your account will be created with retailer access, unlocking the B2B space.
auth.confirm_sent_body: A confirmation email has been sent to activate your account.
auth.err_rate_limit: Too many email attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
auth.err_email_invalid: This email address was rejected. Try another address.
auth.err_exists: An account already exists with this email address.
auth.err_generic: Something went wrong, please try again.

locator.title: Where to find Bloom?
locator.count: {count, plural, =0 {No retailers} one {# retailer} other {# retailers}}

newsletter.title: Stay informed
newsletter.gdpr: By subscribing, you agree to receive our news. You can unsubscribe at any time.

footer.tagline: Bloom, the Garden of Wonders. A gentle, poetic and mysterious game for ages 7 to 77.
footer.rights: © {year} Bloom Project. The Garden of Wonders. All rights reserved.
